non_affiliation.required_text: LegalForecastBench is an independent project. Harvey AI, Harvey LAB, and LegalQuants are not sponsors, partners, or endorsers of this work.

preliminary.required_label: Preliminary — one task pair, operator-run, not independently reproducible
required_evidence: A frozen pre-spend task, arm, model, settings, containment, resource, order, retry, evaluator, metric, and claims specification
Hash-identical solver-visible bytes and physical solver/evaluator separation
Sealed deliverables evaluated separately with every attempt and failure retained
Independent arithmetic, privacy, credential, path, transcript, grader-canary, and claims scans
Peer reporting of score, selected/solved/evaluated coverage, cost basis, exposed token dimensions, wall-clock, attempts, retries, and failures
permitted_claims: A plumbing result for the pinned task and run
An observed paired difference only when the complete compatibility key matches
Separately labeled system-bundle observations when the compatibility key does not match

required_evidence: Contributor-grade whole-process containment and solver/evaluator canaries
Explicit fail-closed auth, receipt, resume, cancellation, redaction, and capability identities
Trusted score verification, hostile package validation, and clean-checkout aggregate and site rebuild
Pinned contributor documentation and immutable submission evidence
permitted_claims: The named package is reproducible through the documented contributor path
Observed score, coverage, efficiency, and failure results for the declared task set and treatment identity
Pilot estimates only when the pilot was frozen before scores and reports supported uncertainty
forbidden_claims: harness causality without the complete matched key and prespecified pilot
overall winner across LegalForecast-MTD and Harvey LAB

required_evidence: Completed exact-100 freeze, dispatch, authenticated receipts, fan-in, aggregate, and publication gates
Frozen registry, eligibility anchor, cohort, labels, packets, budgets, and run identity
Independent artifact, arithmetic, claims, privacy, and disclosure audit
Headline micro-Brier results with clustered uncertainty, coverage, accounting, model identity, and limitations
permitted_claims: Relative performance of frozen Cycle 1 model configurations on the shared exact-100 LegalForecast-MTD cohort
Audited Cycle 1 score, coverage, cost, token, time, cadence, and failure facts
Methodological claims supported by the frozen artifacts and declared design
forbidden_claims: capability improvement across cycles with different case mixes
cross-suite ranking against Harvey LAB rubric scores
overall winner across official and community tracks

required_disclosures: Official tier label
Exact-100 cohort and Cycle 1 identity
Score, uncertainty, coverage, accounting, model identity, baseline context, audit link, and limitations
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Read the report, then follow the immutable audit and methods links before interpreting model differences.

required_disclosures: Official tier label
Metric direction and clustered uncertainty
Coverage, baseline context, and link to the full report
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Compare frozen Cycle 1 rows only, then read the report for uncertainty, exclusions, and limits.

required_disclosures: Exact preliminary label
Matched-key result or system-bundle mismatch
Task and arm identities, score, coverage, cost, tokens, wall-clock, attempts, retries, failures, and evaluator limits
Issue 49 remains open and the result is not contributor-safe
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Inspect the pinned specification and machine evidence before interpreting the observed result.

required_disclosures: Exact preliminary label
Separate Codex addendum and treatment identity
Exact compatibility outcome, score, coverage, cost, tokens, wall-clock, attempts, retries, and failures
No Claude-versus-Codex ranking and no claim that Codex delayed the Claude result
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Compare disclosed system bundles and compatibility facts without treating the follow-on as a general harness ranking.

required_disclosures: Reproducible community tier label
Non-official identity
Task, harness, model, evaluator, compatibility, coverage, efficiency, attempts, failures, and immutable package links
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Open the validated package and reproduction instructions before comparing community rows.

required_disclosures: Official tier label next to the result link
Cycle identity, headline metric, and report link
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Open the audited Cycle 1 report and methods rather than relying on the landing-page summary.

required_disclosures: Exact preliminary label next to the result link
One-task scope and non-official identity
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Read the full writeup and frozen specification before interpreting the observed difference.

required_disclosures: Reproducible community tier label
Non-official identity and contributor documentation link
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Run the pinned fixture, validate a package, and follow the contributor submission path.

required_disclosures: Official tier label for Cycle 1 evidence
Methods, contamination limits, uncertainty, audit references, and limitations
Independent tier labels for any community appendix result
public_surfaces.call_to_action: Review the methods and immutable artifacts; cite the released version and disclose whether any community appendix is preliminary or reproducible.
